$metadata.name: HealthPowr Design System
$metadata.description: Complete design token system for HealthPowr — community-first health services platform
$metadata.author: HealthPowr Design Team

50.$description: Lightest teal — page backgrounds, hover states

100.$description: Very light teal — badge backgrounds, tag fills

300.$description: Soft teal — icon fills, decorative accents

600.$description: Brand teal — logo hexagon, primary buttons, links

700.$description: Deep teal — hover states on primary elements

950.$description: Near black teal — high contrast text on light

500.$description: Brand green — pulse dot, success states, CTAs

0.$description: Pure white — page background, card surfaces

100.$description: Very light gray — input backgrounds, section fills

sans.$description: Primary typeface — body text, UI labels

sm.$description: Small radius — badges, tags, inline chips

gradient.$description: Brand gradient — hero banners, CTA sections

requestCard.$description: Service request card — core HealthPowr component

darkMode.$description: Override tokens for dark theme. Apply when [data-theme='dark'] or @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)
